## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` new impl feature
- [ ] `fix:` impl bug fix
- [ ] `spec:` spec text change (requires accepted ADR for breaking changes)
- [ ] `conformance:` corpus or runner protocol change
- [ ] `docs:` docs only
- [ ] `chore:` tooling / CI / deps

## Test plan

<!-- Bulleted checklist. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
